title: Add trusted landing records for squash and rebase integration evidence
summary: Make target-integration verification work for non-merge landings by recording trusted landing evidence that binds rebased or squashed target commits back to the originating task and review artifacts.

acceptance.label: Squash and rebase landings can be verified through trusted PRISM records rather than raw branch reachability alone.
Landing evidence can bind review artifacts, target commits, and task ids without relying on ambiguous commit ancestry.
Ambiguous or unverifiable target commits remain rejected until explicit trusted landing evidence exists.
